title: Lens GRN Perturbation Record
description: Schema for gene regulatory network perturbation records derived from the Lens_GRN_June_2016 dataset.

S_No.description: Row identifier or record index from source spreadsheet

Regulator.description: Gene or factor acting as regulator; may contain multiple comma-separated entries

Target.description: Reported target gene, process, or phenotype term

New_gene_symbol_for_target.description: Normalized or updated gene symbol for target

Perturbation.description: Type or direction of perturbation (e.g., knockout, knockdown, overexpression, symbolic notation)

Effect.description: Observed regulatory effect (activation, repression, neutral, symbolic notation)

Measurement.description: Experimental assay or measurement technique used

Tissue_of_regulator.description: Tissue where regulator activity or expression was measured

Tissue_of_target.description: Tissue where target response was measured

Stage_secondary.description: Secondary or refined developmental stage annotation

Clinical_Relevant_Phenotype_in_Human.description: Mapped or related human clinical phenotype

TS_of_regulator.description: Developmental stage or timeseries annotation for regulator

TS_of_target.description: Developmental stage or timeseries annotation for target
